description: Data requirements collected from boss literature before strategy implementation.

requirements.frequency: daily first; intraday only after timing/execution controls are specified
requirements.current_fallback: yfinance can supply OHLCV and adjusted close; VWAP, market cap history, and point-in-time industry classification remain pending

requirements.frequency: monthly for paper replication; daily can be used for ETF proxy prototype with disclosure
requirements.current_fallback: SPY, IEF/TLT, UUP, LQD/HYG, DBC/GLD/USO, and VIX from yfinance
blocking_gaps: actual hedge fund or target strategy return series

requirements.minimum_history: 10+ years preferred; 1970s history for research if macro data is available
requirements.frequency: monthly regime classification, daily market monitoring
requirements.current_fallback: ETF market proxies from yfinance plus simple market-regime heuristics

requirements.frequency: daily prototype, monthly academic-style model later
requirements.current_fallback: SPY, VIX, BIL, IEF/TLT from yfinance
